title: Dasygrammitis purpurascens
taxonomy: Dasygrammitis purpurascens is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Dasygrammitis and is a type of vascular plant. The classification of Dasygrammitis purpurascens is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Polypodiales, Family: Polypodiaceae, Genus: Dasygrammitis, Species: D. purpurascens. The classification of Dasygrammitis purpurascens reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants. This classification is based on the study of its morphology and molecular characteristics.

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and improve overall well-being.
